MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
Off Calendar Jun-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Laura Flynn, for defendant/moving party
Meg Quinn, Plaintiff appeared in Propria Persona
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted with modifications. Defendants' Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Discovery and Appearance At Deposition, and Request For Order Extending Time Within Which Discovery Can Be Completed is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for her deposition on or before June 16, 2005. The notice of deposition may be served on less than 10 days notice. The discovery cut off is extended to June 17, 2005.
The court finds that Plaintiff's failure to participate in discovery and to appear for her deposition were misuses of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $346.30 to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.

Modification: Ruling modified so that the deposition shall take place on 6/15/05. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Matter comes on for settlement conference. Laura Flynn, Esq. present for defendants, no appearance by plaintiff. Court grants request for OSC for nonappearance by plaintiff. Cause not settled. Trial date maintained. Judge: Julie Tang; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Ann Mendoza (D. 303)
